title: Garlicky and Shattering Russian Strawberries Casserole
description: A sweet and savory vegetarian casserole featuring fresh strawberries, onions, and garlic, perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion. This dish is a fun twist on traditional Russian desserts and is sure to be a hit with kids and adults alike.

ingredients.name: 1 1/2 cups fresh strawberries, hulled and sliced

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the sliced strawberries, thinly sliced onion, and minced garlic.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the greek yogurt, mozzarella cheese, vanilla extract, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg until well combined.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Press half of the shortbread cookie crumbs into the bottom of a ttukbaegi earthenware cooking vessel or 9x13 inch baking dish.
Add the strawberry mixture on top of the cookie crumbs, followed by the remaining shortbread cookie crumbs.
Drizzle the melted butter over the top of the casserole and sprinkle with the beaten egg.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the casserole is golden brown and the egg is set.
Let the casserole cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional sliced strawberries and shortbread cookie crumbs if desired.
